resultList.dtldesc: Welcome to your new home at Laxmi Complex, Taloja, Navi Mumbai-a 1 BHK residence offering freehold ownership, Vaastu compliance, and an east-facing aspect. Ideal for those seeking a harmonious living space with convenience and positive energy.::::::::::::Property Specifications ::::::::::::Located in a prime area, this spacious 1 BHK apartment spans 665 sqft across 4 out of 5 floors in the building. It comes unfurnished, offering a blank canvas for personalization. Inside, you'll find 1 well-sized bedroom and 1 bathroom with separate toilet and bath areas, featuring Western-style fittings. The bedroom opens up to a balcony that overlooks lush greenery, providing a serene retreat.::::::::::::The living cum dining area is versatile and accommodating, perfect for various setups. The kitchen is equipped with standard fittings and includes a utility area attached for added convenience. The apartment boasts durable vitrified and granite flooring throughout, ensuring both aesthetic appeal and ease of maintenance.::::::::::::Facilities ::::::::::::Residents benefit from round-the-clock water supply and 100% power backup, ensuring uninterrupted comfort. Security is well-managed with a dedicated guard and CCTV surveillance. A single lift serves the building, enhancing accessibility. Additional amenities include a host of facilities such as a park, reserved parking, water storage, private terrace/garden, Vaastu compliance, visitor parking, maintenance staff, kids play area, retail boulevard (retail shops), and fire fighting equipment.::::::::::::Locality ::::::::::::Nestled near the Metro and Shiv Temple, this bustling locality combines convenience with tranquility. Within a 1 km radius, residents have access to schools, ensuring a straightforward commute for students. Nearby hospitals provide essential healthcare services, ensuring residents' well-being is prioritized. Shopping enthusiasts can explore malls and supermarkets conveniently located within the vicinity, making daily errands effortless.::::::::::::Public transport options are plentiful, with buses and autos readily available, ensuring easy connectivity to various parts of the city. Banking needs are met with banks and ATMs close by, offering financial convenience at residents' fingertips. The locality is further enhanced by its proximity to a Metro Station, just 500 meters away.
